summary: Tested Password Recovery Feature for Trend Syria. All 3 APIs and frontend flows working correctly. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All 4 steps of password recovery flow tested and working.

forgot_password_api.details: Searches for account by phone number. Returns has_emergency_phone flag to determine verification options

verify_identity_api.details: Supports two verification types: 'emergency' (last 4 digits of emergency phone) and 'name' (full name matching). Returns reset_token on success

reset_password_api.details: Validates reset_token, enforces password strength (min 6 chars), updates password hash with bcrypt, invalidates old refresh tokens

forgot_password_page_step1.details: Step 1: Phone input, progress bar with 3 segments, 'find account' button

forgot_password_page_step2.details: Step 2: Toggle between emergency phone and name verification, help section with WhatsApp contact

forgot_password_page_step3.details: Step 3: New password and confirm password inputs with match indicator (green checkmark)

forgot_password_page_step4.details: Step 4: Success message with 'go to login' button

login_page_forgot_link.details: Link 'نسيت كلمة المرور؟' with data-testid='forgot-password-link' navigates to /forgot-password

register_page_emergency_field.details: Emergency phone field with data-testid='emergency-phone-input', label 'رقم الطوارئ (اختياري)', description about password recovery

nonexistent_user.message: هذا الرقم غير مسجل في التطبيق

critical_code_review_comments: Password recovery flow implemented correctly with 3-step process
Reset tokens are 32 chars and expire after 15 minutes
Rate limiting applied: 3/min for forgot-password and reset-password, 5/min for verify-identity
Old refresh tokens invalidated after password reset
Flexible name matching: requires 3+ matching parts OR exact match
Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Updated test user 0900000000 with emergency_phone='0912345678' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password recovery feature fully implemented and tested. Test user 0900000000 has emergency_phone set to 0912345678. All 3 APIs working with proper validation and error handling.
implementation_notes: Reset token is 32 characters long and expires in 15 minutes
Name verification is flexible - matches 3+ parts or exact name
Emergency phone verification checks last 4 digits only
Password must be at least 6 characters
After password reset, all refresh tokens are invalidated
